summary_en: FY5/26 year-end dividend revised to 10 yen/share (5 yen ordinary + 5 yen special 30th-anniversary). Prior forecast: 5 yen. Rationale: founder milestone appreciation to shareholders.
title_en: Notice regarding revision of dividend forecast (30th anniversary commemorative dividend)
translation_en_brief: Media Five K.K. (ticker 3824) announced a revision to its dividend forecast for the fiscal year ending May 2026 at a board meeting held on 25 May 2026. The year-end dividend per share has been increased from a previously forecast 5 yen to 10 yen, comprising 5 yen in ordinary dividend and 5 yen in special commemorative dividend. The company stated the revision was made to express gratitude to shareholders on the occasion of the company's 30th anniversary on 14 June 2026. The revised dividend is subject to approval at the 30th ordinary general meeting of shareholders scheduled for 27 August 2026. No interim dividend is planned for the period.
